testCaseName: Create Capital Project From Prior Project And Update Labor FTE And Cost
objective: Verify that a user can create a capital project from a prior project, open the estimate, add a labor line, set labor pool and FTE, remove a copied row, update cost, and verify the calculated total.

steps.target: SAP OAuth / Twenty5 iPE Quote dev application

steps.notes: Clicked twice during SAP authentication flow.
Opens the estimate in a popup window.

steps.target: New labor row labor pool cell

steps.notes: Recorded using positional icon-only buttons; map to visible dialog button labels before maintaining.

steps.target: Estimate popup and original quote page

expectedResults: The user can sign in and open the new capital project workflow.
Required setup fields accept the recorded values.
The customer search returns and selects `RTC1`.
The prior project search returns and selects `| (AS) Copy from Template v5`.
Clicking `Copy` copies project data from the selected prior project.
The estimate opens in a popup window after confirmation.
A new labor row can be added.
The labor pool can be set to `Project Manager`.
The copied labor row can be removed after confirmation.
Update Cost recalculates the total and displays `USD 3.28M`.
automationNotes: The raw generated script uses `page` before explicitly creating it; a maintained test should use the repository Playwright fixture or create a page from the context.
The raw recording contains generated ExtJS IDs that should be replaced with stable helpers or scoped locators before maintained automation is created.
The `#iBEBusUnitLocal-8896-trigger-picker` id was mapped back to the visible `Leading Site *` field; do not describe it as `Org. Unit *` or `Business Unit` in consultant-facing steps.
The prior-project search should use the visible `//*[contains(@data-componentid,'iBESearchComboBox') and @aria-hidden="false"]` search component.
The delete confirmation was recorded through icon-only positional buttons. A maintained automation should identify and assert the visible confirmation dialog labels before clicking.
The recorded project name is static; a maintained test should append a timestamp or otherwise make it unique if the application requires unique names.
The dialog handlers dismiss browser dialogs. A maintained test should capture and assert whether any dialog messages are expected during estimate open or cost update.
